edges.source: Auto-Défense des Communautés Victimes de l'Ituri
edges.target: Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo / Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais
descriptions: ADCVI acted against CODECO/URDPC as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: ADCVI engaged in provocative actions against rival groups, such as the Coopérative pour le Développement du Congo /Union des Révolutionnaires pour la Défense du Peuple Congolais (CODECO/URDPC)

descriptions: Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis is listed as an ally in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis (2015)

descriptions: Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis is listed as an ally of Ahrar al-Sham in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis (2015) [infobox]

descriptions: Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis was an ally of Ahrar al-Sham in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Aknaf Bait al-Maqdis (2015)

descriptions: Infobox lists Free Papua Movement as an opponent of JI.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Free Papua Movement

descriptions: Free Papua Movement is listed as an opponent of Jemaah Islamiyah.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Non-state opponents ... Free Papua Movement

Al-Shabaab.description: Sunni Islamist political and militant organization based in Somalia, formed in the mid-2000s as a youth militia within the Islamic Courts Union. It controls territory in south and southwestern Somalia, is allied with al-Qaeda, and has been designated a terrorist group by multiple countries. Active in the Somali Civil War, it has carried out high-fatality attacks and operates in neighboring East African countries.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is listed as a non-state ally of Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Al-Shabaab

descriptions: Al-Shabaab harbored al-Qaeda leaders and declared allegiance, but al-Qaeda largely ignored them.
edges.evidence_quote: Somali Islamist organization Al-Shabaab occasionally harboured al-Qaeda leaders in Somalia, in exchange for their technical assistance. In September 2009, in a video entitled "At Your Service Osama", Al-Shabaab members publicly declared allegiance to bin Laden—but this reflected an "unrequited courtship", largely ignored by al-Qaeda.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is a direct affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda has the following direct affiliates: - Al-Shabaab

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is a group (affiliate) of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Group: Groups: JNIM, AQAP, AQIM, Al-Shabaab, AQIS, Ansaru

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is listed as a group under Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: JNIM , AQAP , AQIM , Al-Shabaab , AQIS , Ansaru

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is listed as a group under al-Qaeda in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: JNIM, AQAP, AQIM, Al-Shabaab, AQIS, Ansaru

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is an ally of AQAP.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies al-Shabaab (2009–present)

descriptions: AQAP and al-Shabaab are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies al-Shabaab (2009–present)

descriptions: AQAP lists al-Shabaab as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies al-Shabaab (2009–present)

descriptions: AQIM is suspected of having links with al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: The group has also been suspected of having links with the Horn of Africa -based militant group al-Shabaab.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has clashed with Ahlu Sunna Waljama'a.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabaab has clashed with the pro-AMISOM Sufi militias of "Ahlu Sunna Waljama'a".

descriptions: Al-Hijra is the official Kenyan wing of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabaab has Kenya-based affiliates, with al-Hijra as its official Kenyan wing from 2012

descriptions: Many early Al-Shabaab leaders previously belonged to al-Ittihad al-Islamiya.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of its early leaders and members previously belonged not only to the Islamic Courts Union but also to the older al-Ittihad al-Islamiya

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is allied with Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: It is allied to the pan-Islamist militant organization al-Qaeda

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is allied with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: It is allied to the pan-Islamist militant organization al-Qaeda

descriptions: Al-Shabaab pledged allegiance to al-Qaeda in 2012, becoming an official affiliate.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabab members pledged allegiance to al-Qaeda in 2012 and has reportedly forged ties with al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb , and al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula .

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has forged ties with AQAP.
edges.evidence_quote: has forged ties with other insurgent groups like AQIM and AQAP

descriptions: Al-Shabaab forged ties with AQAP.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabab members pledged allegiance to al-Qaeda in 2012 and has reportedly forged ties with al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb , and al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula .

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has forged ties with AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: has forged ties with other insurgent groups like AQIM and AQAP

descriptions: Al-Shabaab forged ties with AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Shabab members pledged allegiance to al-Qaeda in 2012 and has reportedly forged ties with al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb , and al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula .

descriptions: Al-Shabaab attempted to coordinate activities with Boko Haram.
edges.evidence_quote: In June 2012, General Carter Ham of the U.S. Army said that Al-Shabaab, al-Qaeda in Islamic Maghreb (AQIM), and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were attempting to coordinate their activities, including in funding, training, and explosives.

descriptions: Hizbul Islam merged into Al-Shabaab after military defeats.
edges.evidence_quote: Hizbul Islam, a smaller group of Somali militants, was merged with Al-Shabaab: after suffering military defeats against Al-Shabaab in southern towns, Hizbul Islam was officially absorbed by its former rival in December 2010.

descriptions: Hizbul Islam split from Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: on September 24, 2012, Hizbul Islam announced that it would split from Al-Shabaab

descriptions: Al-Shabaab lists Houthis as an alleged ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Houthis (alleged, denied)

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is alleged to be allied with Houthis, though denied.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Houthis (alleged, denied)

descriptions: Houthis are alleged non-state allies of Al-Shabaab, though denied.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula, al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, Houthis (alleged, denied)

descriptions: Al-Shabaab and Houthis have a growing relationship involving weapons and training.
edges.evidence_quote: There is a growing relationship between the al-Shabaab and Houthis. The former has pledged to escalate piracy off Somalia in exchange for more advanced weapons and training. The United Nations reported physical meetings occurring between the two militant groups in February 2025.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab originated as a youth militia within the ICU's military wing.
edges.evidence_quote: Formed in the mid-2000s as a youth militia within the wider military wing of the Islamic Courts Union

descriptions: Al-Shabaab originated as a youth militia within the Islamic Courts Union.
edges.evidence_quote: Formed in the mid-2000s as a youth militia within the wider military wing of the Islamic Courts Union

descriptions: Al-Shabaab clashed violently with ISIL after ISIL attempted to recruit its members.
edges.evidence_quote: The groups clashed violently on several occasions, most fiercely during 2015, and Al-Shabaab's internal security service continued to arrest, and sometimes execute, suspected ISIS supporters within Al-Shabaab's ranks.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab competes with Islamic State in Somalia.
edges.evidence_quote: possibly motivated by competition with Islamic State in Somalia

descriptions: Islamic State in Somalia is a splinter group that broke away from Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2015, senior Al-Shabaab commander Abdul Qadir Mumin and approximately 20 of his followers in Puntland pledged allegiance to ISIL, establishing what became Islamic State in Somalia (ISIS).

descriptions: Al-Shabaab lists Islamic State Somalia Province as an opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Non-State opponents Islamic State Somalia Province (Abnaa ul-Calipha)

descriptions: Al-Shabaab opposes Islamic State Somalia Province.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Islamic State Somalia Province (Abnaa ul-Calipha)

descriptions: Islamic State Somalia Province is an opponent of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-State opponents Islamic State Somalia Province (Abnaa ul-Calipha)

descriptions: Jaysh Ayman is a Kenya-based affiliate unit of Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: then with a unit established in 2013 known as Jaysh Ayman

descriptions: Nigerian government claims Boko Haram has connections to al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nigerian government claims that Boko Haram is 'the West Africa branch of the world-wide Al-Qaeda movement' with connections to al-Shabaab in Somalia and AQIM in Mali.

descriptions: The Hobyo-Haradhere Piracy Network supplies al-Shabaab with weapons and materials.
edges.evidence_quote: These pirates do, however, also supply ISS' rival in Puntland, al-Shabaab, with weapons and other materials.

descriptions: al-Shabaab is an alleged ally of Houthis.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... al-Shabaab (alleged)

descriptions: Infobox lists al-Shabaab as an alleged ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... al-Shabaab (alleged)

descriptions: al-Shabaab is an alleged ally of the Houthis.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... al-Shabaab (alleged)

descriptions: Houthis and Al-Shabaab have a deepening transactional relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2024 a UN report states that Al-Shabaab and Houthis had a relationship that was "transactional or opportunistic, and not ideological", while a 2025 report states that their relationship was deepening and posed a threat to regional security.

descriptions: Houthis are alleged allies of al-Shabaab per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... al-Shabaab (alleged)

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is listed as a province of the Islamic State in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Mozambique Province Al-Shabaab

descriptions: Al-Shabaab is listed as a province of Islamic State in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Mozambique Province Al-Shabaab

descriptions: ISS originated from defectors from al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: The group first appeared in the latter half of 2015 when pro-Islamic State fighters within al-Shabaab defected and pledged allegiance to IS caliph Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi.

descriptions: ISS and al-Shabaab are declared enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: ISS is also the declared enemy of al-Shabaab , which considers the Islamic State a significant threat to its own predominance among Jihadist factions in Somalia.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab attacked and destroyed IS cells in southern Somalia.
edges.evidence_quote: In two notable incidents in November and December 2015, al-Shabaab attacked and destroyed two of the most important southern IS cells, namely the ones of Bashir Abu Numan and Mohamed Makkawi Ibrahim.

descriptions: Rivalry reignited with clashes in 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: the rivalry between ISS and al-Shabaab reignited in full, with several clashes occurring between the groups.

descriptions: Al-Shabaab declared war on ISS in December 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: This amounted to an official declaration of war .

descriptions: ISS evicted al-Shabaab from contested area, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In course of 2020's first half, ISS gradually increased the number of its attacks, while its troops evicted al-Shabaab from the contested area around Dasaan, Mudug region.

descriptions: ISS and al-Shabaab cooperated to a limited degree after the Qandala campaign.
edges.evidence_quote: ISS began to cooperate with al-Shabaab to a limited degree during the subsequent months.

descriptions: ISSP formed from defectors from Al-Shabaab.
edges.evidence_quote: The group first appeared in 2015 when elements within the Somali Islamist group Al-Shabaab defected and pledged allegiance to IS.

descriptions: ISS and al-Shabaab temporarily ceased fighting after March 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: From this point onwards, ISS and al-Shabaab temporarily ceased fighting each other with the exception of some isolated incidents.

descriptions: Al Shabaab pledged allegiance to the Taliban government.
edges.evidence_quote: Many designated terror groups have pledged their allegiance to the new Taliban government, these groups include: Al-Qaeda, al Shabaab, Boko Haram, Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal-Muslimin and Turkistan Islamic Party, Tehreek-e-Taliban Pakistan, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen.

DLASTHR.description: DLASTHR is an Assyrian criminal organization active in southwestern Sydney, Australia, originating from the earlier Assyrian Kings gang. Founded in 1997, it is involved in drug trafficking, murder, and extortion. The group has been engaged in turf wars with rival gangs like the True Kings, leading to public shootings and firebombings. NSW police have conducted numerous operations targeting the gang.

descriptions: The north side Popes rival the Assyrian Kings per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation , Insane Deuces, Familia Stones, Almighty Gaylords , Latin Kings , Black P. Stones , Assyrian Kings

descriptions: Brothers for Life absorbed the remnants of DLASTHR around 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: In turn, B4L took over in the area, absorbing the remnants of MBM, and prolific Assyrian street-gang DLASTHR (The Last Hour), including member Michael Odisho.

descriptions: Bronx Boys are listed as rivals of DLASTHR in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Bronx Boys , True Kings

descriptions: DLASTHR assisted outlaw motorcycle gangs, including Comanchero, with drug and weapons distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: Police also allege that the gang was assisting outlaw motorcycle gangs with the distribution of drugs and weapons.

descriptions: DLASTHR is suspected of killing ex-Nomads member Adrian Buxton.
edges.evidence_quote: ex- Nomads bikie gang member Adrian Buxton was fatally shot outside his home on 17 May 2016. In the aftermath of Hermiz’s killing, police came to suspect that the Assyrian criminal organisation may have been behind Buxton’s death

descriptions: DLASTHR was in a turf war with the True Kings over drug supply.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 2010s, gun violence was thought to be part of the gang's turf war over drug supply with its rival gang, the True Kings.

descriptions: DLASTHR and True Kings were in conflict over drug supply, involving shootings and fire bombings.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, conflict between DLASTHR and a young breakaway group known as 'True Kings', resulted in Drive by shootings, fire bombings and intimidation, as tensions over drug supply erupted between the two gangs.

descriptions: DLASTHR and True Kings are sworn enemies in an ongoing feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Police allege the 'callous killing' was connected to an ongoing feud between rival Assyrian gangs, the True Kings and DLASTHR, a crime group that has long been regarded as a sworn enemy of Mr Kettule over the years.

'Ndrina Mazzaferro.description: The Mazzaferro are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Marina di Gioiosa Ionica, Calabria, Italy. They are active in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and have been involved in major infrastructure projects. The clan has branches in northern Italy and abroad, including Germany, Belgium, and the United Kingdom. They have been in a long-standing feud with the Aquino-Scali clan since the 1970s.

descriptions: Cataldo was part of a joint venture with Mazzaferro for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: A joint venture of 'Ndrangheta clans in the trafficking included the ... Mazzaferro 'ndrina

descriptions: Cataldo and Mazzaferro were allied in the war.
edges.evidence_quote: In provincia ci fu la vittoria dei Piromalli e Mammoliti nella Piana di Gioia Tauro e dei Cataldo e Mazzaferro nella Locride tutte 'ndrine che avevano spinto per l'abbattimento della vecchia 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Mazzaferro 'ndrina is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cataldo 'ndrina , Mazzaferro 'ndrina , Costa 'ndrina, Ierinò 'ndrina

descriptions: Vincenzo Mazzaferro was killed by Ierinò after failing to keep promises.
edges.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Mazzaferro avrebbe fatto da tramite con lo Stato per la contrattazione, ma non mantenendo le promesse fu ucciso dagli Jerinò il 14 gennaio 1993

descriptions: Ierinò are allies of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Mazzaferro dei Cataldo e dei Costa .

descriptions: Lo Presti is linked by close family ties to Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: In Calabria è nota come famiglia Maneja ed è legata da stretti vincoli di parentela ai Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Lo Presti originated as part of Mazzaferro, then became a faction and later an independent 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Nata inizialmente come intranea alla famiglia Mazzaferro , diventa una fazione e successivamente 'ndrina a sé.

descriptions: Mammoliti-Rugolo is allied with the Mazzaferro 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mammoliti-Rugolo è alleata dei Piromalli , Varone e dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Mancuso and Mazzaferro were involved together in drug trafficking, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Ossessione" ... presunti esponenti dei Mancuso in sodalizio con criminali albanesi ... e con il criminale Giuseppe Campisi insieme ai Mazzaferro

descriptions: Mazzaferro has contacts with Barbaro.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Mazzaferro has contacts with Bruzzaniti.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Mazzaferro has contacts with Calabrò.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Mazzaferro is allied with Cataldo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: Mazzaferro is allied with Costa.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Femia were allied in a feud against Aquino-Scali.
edges.evidence_quote: faida che vede contrapposte da una parte gli Aquino-Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Femia are allied in the faida against Aquino-Scali.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 entrano nel contrabbando delle sigarette e scoppia la faida che vede contrapposte ancora oggi da una parte gli Aquino -Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia .

descriptions: Mazzaferro is allied with Ierinò.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati con le 'ndrine degli Ierinò , dei Costa e dei Cataldo

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Lo Presti are closely linked by family ties.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono strettamente legati da vincoli di parentela ai Lo Presti di Bardonecchia.

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Mancuso were involved together in an international drug trafficking ring, as per the 2019 operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 29 gennaio 2019 si conclude l'operazione Ossessione che porta all'arresto di 25 persone, tra cui presunti esponenti dei Mancuso in sodalizio con criminali albanesi ... e con il criminale Giuseppe Campisi insieme ai Mazzaferro

descriptions: Mazzaferro has contacts with Morabito.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Mazzaferro represented Pesce in drug deals.
edges.evidence_quote: Oreste Pagano, collaboratore di giustizia racconta che il 30% della cocaina importata dalla Colombia dai Caruana era destinata ai Mazzaferro, essi rappresentavano anche i Barbaro , gli Ierinò , i Morabito , i Cataldo , i Pesce .

descriptions: Mazzaferro has contacts with Raso-Albanese.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Aquino are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mazzaferro sono una 'ndrina di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme agli Aquino , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70.

descriptions: Mazzaferro conducted drug trafficking together with Cuntrera-Caruana in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Il commercio di stupefacenti negli anni '90 è stato fatto insieme ad alcune 'ndrine di Gioiosa Jonica e del clan siciliano agrigentino dei Cuntrera-Caruana.

descriptions: The Ursino worked together with the Mazzaferro and Macrì on the construction of the Port of Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del Porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro e ai Macrì

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì were arrested alongside Mazzaferro affiliates in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2016 si conclude l'operazione “Tipographic” che porta all'arresto di 36 persone presunte affiliate agli Ursino-Macrì e agli Jerinò di Gioiosa Jonica , ai Rumbo-Galea-Figliomeni di Siderno , ai Bruzzese di Grotteria e ai Mazzaferro di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: Aquino and Mazzaferro are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme ai Mazzaferro , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70

descriptions: Aquino are rivals of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo un collaboratore di giustizia negli ultimi anni si è avvicinata ed alleata agli Aquino , rivali dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Commisso cooperated with Mazzaferro in port construction.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro e agli Ursino.

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Cataldo were allied with De Stefano in the war.
edges.evidence_quote: In provincia ci fu la vittoria dei Piromalli e Mammoliti nella Piana di Gioia Tauro e dei Cataldo e Mazzaferro nella Locride tutte 'ndrine che avevano spinto per l'abbattimento della vecchia 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Individuals held dual membership in Cosa Nostra and the Mazzaferro 'Ndrangheta cosca.
edges.evidence_quote: Quindi vi erano persone che possedevano due affiliazioni, come per esempio il messinese Rosario Saporito, personaggio di spicco della cosca dei Mazzaferro, o Calogero Marcenò, originario di San Cataldo (CL) divenuto capo locale della cosca calabrese Zagari.

descriptions: Yoshimi-kogyo is ranked as the third-largest yakuza group in Okinawa, after Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai is the largest yakuza organization in Okinawa Prefecture, followed by the second-largest Kyokuryu-kai and the third-largest Yoshimi-kogyo.

descriptions: Yoshimi-kogyo is a branch organization of Toa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai's notable branch organizations include the Yoshimi-kogyo ( 誼興業 ) .

descriptions: Dragone and Vasapollo were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Ne scoppia una anche tra i Dragone e i Vasapollo

Aquino 'ndrina.description: The Aquino 'ndrina is a 'Ndrangheta clan based in Marina di Gioiosa Ionica, Italy, active alongside the Mazzaferro clan. They are involved in extortion, usury, and international drug trafficking, with alliances with other 'ndrine. The clan has been in conflict with the Mazzaferro-Femia since the 1970s and has members arrested globally.

descriptions: Aquino 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Commisso 'ndrina , Aquino 'ndrina, Ursino 'ndrina

descriptions: Roccisano was a broker for Ierinò, Aquino, and Commisso, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Vincenzo Roccisano, di Gioiosa Jonica , broker degli Jerinò, degli Aquino e dei Commisso .

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Lo Presti recently allied with Aquino, who are rivals of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo un collaboratore di giustizia negli ultimi anni si è avvicinata ed alleata agli Aquino , rivali dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Aquino are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mazzaferro sono una 'ndrina di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme agli Aquino , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70.

descriptions: Morabito and Aquino were arrested together in the Metropolis operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 marzo 2013 si conclude l'operazione Metropolis ... che ha portato all'arresto di 20 persone, tra affiliati dei Morabito ... e degli Aquino

descriptions: Pesce was involved in international drug trafficking alongside Aquino, Ierinò, Commisso, and Coluccio.
edges.evidence_quote: per la 'ndrangheta c'erano presunti affiliati agli Ierinò , Commisso , Coluccio , Aquino e Pesce.

descriptions: The Ursino are allied with the Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino sono una potente 'ndrina di Gioiosa Jonica , alleata degli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Alvaro for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... gli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Bellocco for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Aquino and Mazzaferro are in conflict since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: attiva nell'omonimo Locale insieme ai Mazzaferro , in contrasto tra di loro sin dagli anni '70

descriptions: Aquino are rivals of Mazzaferro.
edges.evidence_quote: Secondo un collaboratore di giustizia negli ultimi anni si è avvicinata ed alleata agli Aquino , rivali dei Mazzaferro .

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Morabito for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Morabito di Africo

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Pesce for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: Pesce - Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Piromalli for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Piromalli di Gioia Tauro

descriptions: Aquino and Scali were allied in a feud against Mazzaferro-Femia.
edges.evidence_quote: faida che vede contrapposte da una parte gli Aquino-Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia

descriptions: Aquino and Scali are allied in the faida against Mazzaferro-Femia.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 entrano nel contrabbando delle sigarette e scoppia la faida che vede contrapposte ancora oggi da una parte gli Aquino -Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia .

descriptions: Schirripa was part of an alliance with Coluccio, Aquino, and Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: la quale faceva parte di un'alleanza con i Coluccio, gli Aquino e i Macrì

descriptions: Aquino are related to the Coluccio clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono imparentati con il clan Coluccio

descriptions: Aquino has agreements with Commisso for international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno numerosi accordi in virtù dei traffici di droga internazionale con le altre 'ndrine tra cui: ... i Commisso di Siderno

descriptions: Aquino managed drug trafficking together with Cartel del Golfo and Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Il traffico veniva gestito insieme al Cartello del Golfo e ai cartelli colombiani

descriptions: Aquino-Coluccio made an agreement with Los Zetas for cocaine trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: L'accordo con i Los Zetas è avvenuto dopo l'arresto dell' ecuadoriano Luis Calderon

descriptions: Commisso (Macrì) cooperated with Aquino in cocaine purchases.
edges.evidence_quote: Schirripa comprava 10 chili di cocaina al mese per conto delle famiglie Macrì, Aquino e Coluccio.

descriptions: Locale di Piscopio has solid contacts with Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalle operazioni Minotauro e Crimine si evince che la locale ha solidi contatti ... gli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

Clan Ascione.description: The Clan Ascione is a Camorra organization based in Ercolano, Italy. It emerged in the 1980s and became dominant after defeating the Esposito clan in a local feud. The clan is involved in extortion and other criminal activities. Its history includes violent conflicts and high-profile murders.

descriptions: Ascione clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan

descriptions: Clan Ascione is a Camorra clan involved in an alliance with Chinese gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i clan coinvolti in questa alleanza c'erano il clan dei Casalesi, il clan Fabbrocino e il clan Ascione.

descriptions: Ascione and Birra fought a decade-long faida, with Ascione-Papale eventually winning.
edges.evidence_quote: seconda faida di Ercolano : faida decennale che vede coinvolti i clan Ascione e Birra

descriptions: The two clans are involved in the second faida of Ercolano.
edges.evidence_quote: Da una decina d'anni, la seconda faida di Ercolano vede coinvolti gli Ascione contro i Birra.

descriptions: Ascione and Birra were rival clans engaged in a violent feud over drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: La spartizione del traffico di stupefacenti ad Ercolano diede avvio ad una sanguinosa faida tra i due clan rivali, ovvero gli Ascione e i Birra.

descriptions: The two clans are in a violent conflict, with multiple murders and retaliations.
edges.evidence_quote: Il capoclan, allora, per placare la sua sete di vendetta, pretese di assistere all'esecuzione della missione di morte che aveva ordinato.

descriptions: The text mentions a 'faida' (feud) involving the Birra-Iacomino clan, implying conflict with Ascione.
edges.evidence_quote: ex killer del clan Birra-Iacomino, durante la faida

descriptions: Iengo-Birra was a splinter group that split from Ascione.
edges.evidence_quote: Tale situazione di fatto contribuiva alla creazione di una nuova fazione opposta, creata dalla scissione delle file del clan Ascione, quella di Tommaso Iengo, soprannominato "Masuccio", e di Giovanni Birra , soprannominato “Giannino a Mazza”. I due decisero di "mettersi in proprio", ed in particolare nel traffico di stupefacenti , costituendo il clan Iengo-Birra

descriptions: Ascione-Papale and Iacomino-Birra are mentioned together as a single entity, suggesting alliance or merger.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliate al clan Ascione-Papale Iacomino-Birra

descriptions: Ciro Borrelli, a member of the Durantini clan, was the target of an attempted murder by the Ascione clan.
edges.evidence_quote: 1996 – 1997 : Tentato omicidio di Ciro Borrelli, appartenente al clan Durantini, all'epoca dei fatti già legato alla 'cuparella'.

descriptions: The two clans were opposed in the first faida of Ercolano.
edges.evidence_quote: La prima faida di Ercolano vede contrapposti il clan degli Esposito contro il clan degli Ascione.

descriptions: Ascione and Esposito were in open war during the first faida.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i due clan è ormai guerra dichiarata.

descriptions: The two clans jointly carried out a revenge killing.
edges.evidence_quote: Per vendicarsi i Fabbrocino e gli Ascione avrebbero ucciso Salvatore Batti

descriptions: Ascione-Papale killed a Falanga affiliate.
edges.evidence_quote: avviene l'omicidio del cutoliano Giuseppe Serra affiliato ai Falanga, l'omicidio avvenne per mano degli Ascione-Papale

descriptions: Ascione and Falanga had an agreement to share drug dealing territories in Torre del Greco.
edges.evidence_quote: Da un'indagine conclusa dall’ Arma dei Carabinieri nel mese di ottobre 2016 è emersa una netta sovrapposizione tra i Falanga e gli Ascione-Papale nella gestione delle piazze di spaccio , in ragione di un accordo funzionale alla spartizione condivisa degli affari illeciti su Torre del Greco .

descriptions: Falanga clan is allied with Ascione-Papale for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie all’alleanza con il più noto e pericoloso clan degli “Ascione-Papale”

descriptions: Ascione and Luongo formed a secret agreement to resist arrests and convictions.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel settembre 2019 emerge un accordo segreto tra due cosche specializzate in spaccio ed estorsioni. Da una parte gli Ascione-Papale, organizzazione criminale attiva a Ercolano e Torre del Greco . Dall’altra, la famiglia Luongo, dinastia della malavita con base a San Giorgio a Cremano .

descriptions: The Papale clan is involved in the second faida alongside the Ascione.
edges.evidence_quote: In questa faida sono coinvolti anche i Papale.

descriptions: Clan Papale is possibly allied with Ascione, as a killer linked to Papale targeted a Birra associate.
edges.evidence_quote: La lunga testimonianza del comandante della Compagnia dei carabinieri di Torre del Greco, Michele De Rosa, ha permesso di accertare un nuovo inquietante aspetto della vicenda: la probabile vicinanza del ventunenne Vincenzo Perna, killer di Lavini, al clan Papale, in quanto riconosciuta dal pentito Ciro Gaudino.

descriptions: Ascione and Papale are part of the same clan, with internal tensions.
edges.evidence_quote: C'è stato un momento durante la sanguinosa faida di Ercolano , precisamente poco prima del 2013 , in cui si è rischiato lo scontro interno nel clan Ascione-Papale tra il gruppo dei siciliani ovvero quelli della famiglia Papale e quelli invece che facevano capo a Ciro Montella o'lione.

descriptions: The text refers to 'clan Ascione-Papale', indicating a merged or allied entity.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliato al clan Ascione-Papale

descriptions: Ascione and Papale are often referred to jointly as Ascione-Papale, indicating a merged or allied group.
edges.evidence_quote: affiliato agli Ascione-Papale

descriptions: The murder of Francesco Vitiello by the Iengo-Birra clan marked the start of a conflict between the two clans.
edges.evidence_quote: 8 luglio 1997 : Omicidio di Francesco Vitiello, elemento vicino al clan Ascione. L'omicidio avvenuto per mano del clan Iengo-Birra, segnava l'inizio di una lotta tra i due clan.

descriptions: Esposito and Ascione fought a war in 1990, with Esposito losing.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida di Ercolano : guerra tra gli Esposito e gli Ascione, combattuta quasi interamente nel 1990

descriptions: Chinese gangs allied with Ascione clan in industrial waste export scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2017, investigators uncovered a plan between the Camorra and Chinese gangs: these exported industrial waste from Italy to China which guaranteed revenues of millions of euros for both organizations. Industrial waste left Prato and arrived in Hong Kong. Among the clans involved in this alliance were the Casalesi clan, the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan.

descriptions: Ascione clan is an ally of Vollaro clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ascione clan, Abate clan (defunct), Giuliano clan (defunct), Anastasio clan, Veneruso clan, Marfella clan

edges.source: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1989, the Movimiento de Restauración Nacional ("Movement of National Restoration", MORENA) was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

edges.source: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MORENA was formed by members of ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: In August 1989, the Movimiento de Restauración Nacional ("Movement of National Restoration", MORENA) was formed by members of ACDEGAM.

edges.target: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: Medellín Cartel funded ACDEGAM.
edges.evidence_quote: Pablo Escobar began funneling large amounts of cash into the organization to pay for equipment, training, and weaponry.

edges.target: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: ACDEGAM provided legal front and logistics for MAS, and MAS backed up ACDEGAM's threats with violence.
edges.evidence_quote: ACDEGAM worked to promote anti-labor policies, and threatened anyone involved with organizing for labor or peasants' rights. The threats were backed up by the MAS, which would come in and attack or assassinate anyone who was suspected of being a 'subversive'.

edges.target: Asociación Campesina de Ganaderos y Agricultores del Magdalena Medio
descriptions: MAS backed ACDEGAM's threats with violence.
edges.evidence_quote: ACDEGAM worked to promote anti-labor policies and threatened anyone involved with organizing for labor or peasants' rights. The threats were backed by the MAS, which would come in and attack or assassinate anyone who was suspected of being a 'subversive'.

descriptions: Conflict between the Schiavone and De Falco factions within the Casalesi clan over money and power.
edges.evidence_quote: I contrasti tra gli Schiavone e i De Falco

Suey Sing Association.description: The Suey Sing Association is a historical Chinese American association established in 1867. Formerly known as the Suey Sing Tong, it changed to its current name in 1920. It has branches in the United States and Canada, and in 1994 became the first Chinese community organization to fly the flag of the People's Republic of China. It currently has over 1000 members.

descriptions: Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs formed an alliance against Bing Kong Tong.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs allied against the Bing Kong Tong

descriptions: The infobox lists Suey Sing Tong as an ally of the Joe Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Suey Sing Tong

descriptions: Suey Sing Tong was in conflict with Bing Kong Tong during a Tong war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hop Sing and Suey Sing Tongs allied against the Bing Kong Tong, instigating one of the most violent Tong wars

descriptions: Suey Sing Tong fought against the Wah Ching.
edges.evidence_quote: Their rivals, the Suey Sing Tong , extended their fight to the Wah Ching.

descriptions: Wah Ching fought a war with Suey Sing Tong for control of Chinatown rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: Beginning in 1969, the Wah Ching fought a war with the Suey Sing Tong for control of Chinatown's gambling, loan-sharking and extortion rackets.

descriptions: The Luppino family later became known as the Luppino-Violi family.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Luppino sarebbe poi diventata nota come famiglia Luppino-Violi.

descriptions: Paolo Violi's sons were affiliated with the Luppino 'ndrina in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Nei primi anni 2000, i due figli di Paolo Violi erano affiliati alla 'Ndrina Luppino a Hamilton (Canada)

descriptions: Trapasso is connected to Tropea-Talarico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero collegati con la cosca Tropea-Talarico di Cropani Marina .

descriptions: The Lenox Street Boys are allied with the Everton Geneva Grizzleys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Orchard Park Trailblazers , Heath Street Gang, Academy Homes Gang, Villa Victoria Park Gang , Everton Geneva Grizzleys

descriptions: Markaz-e-Dawat-ul-Irshad is the parent body of LeT.
edges.evidence_quote: The ISYF is believed to have been the first Sikh militant group to establish contact with ideologues from Markaz-e-Dawat-ul-Irshad, the Salafist organization that served as the parent body of Lashkar-e-Taiba (LeT).

descriptions: Sho' Nuff is a rival biker gang to Sin City Deciples, involved in a 2009 murder.
edges.evidence_quote: the murder, which took place on an interstate road in Birmingham, Alabama , stemmed from a gang conflict as Bevelle had been the president of a rival biker gang to the Sin City Deciples, Sho' Nuff.

descriptions: Gioffrè fought and won a feud against the Pellegrino clan in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Settanta vincono la faida di Seminara contro la 'ndrina dei Pellegrino.

descriptions: Santaiti won a feud against Pellegrino in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 vincono la faida di Seminara contro la 'ndrina dei Pellegrino.

descriptions: Sabatino is a satellite clan under Pesce.
edges.evidence_quote: I Sabatino sono una loro cosca satellite.

descriptions: Sabatino clan allied with 'Ndrangheta 'ndrine in Vibo Valentia.
edges.evidence_quote: tra i Sabatino di San Severo con le 'ndrine di Vibo Valentia

descriptions: Los Gallegos is the armed wing of Tren de Aragua in Chile.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Gallegos, 'brazo armado' del Tren de Aragua en Chile

descriptions: Los Gallegos is a cell of Tren de Aragua in Peru and Spain.
edges.evidence_quote: Luis José Rodríguez R. alias "Mamera" , del conocido grupo criminal, Los Gallegos

descriptions: Caltagirone Mafia maintains ties with Nardo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan maintains ties with other criminal groups, including the Santapaola-Ercolano of Catania and the Nardo clan of Lentini.

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Orgen's gang fought over labor racketeering.
edges.evidence_quote: Kaplan and Orgen soon began fighting over protection of wet wash laundry workers in violent shootouts around New York.

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Spanish's gang engaged in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: A violent war between the two soon began; fighting, particularly in the garment district, continued until Johnny Spanish was killed while leaving a Manhattan restaurant by three men, most likely including Kaplan, on July 29, 1919.

descriptions: Kaplan's gang and Spanish's gang were initially allied, then became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: The two gangs were allied for a while before a bitter personal rivalry developed between the Dropper and Johnny Spanish.

descriptions: George Street conducted successful hits against Brick City leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: The late 2000s is thought to have been a boon to the gang, allegedly culminating in successful hits against leaders of rival gangs ( Southside , Brick City, Ghost Town ) in 2010.

edges.target: Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain
descriptions: APCLS signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, which includes M23 as a party to the ceasefire.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including the Alliance des Patriotes pour un Congo Libre et Souverain (APCLS)... signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

Oaxaca Cartel.description: The Oaxaca Cartel was a smaller Mexican drug cartel that operated in southern Mexico, primarily in Oaxaca and Chiapas. It focused on marijuana and cocaine trafficking and was allied with the Tijuana Cartel. Founded by Pedro Díaz Parada Cruz in the 1970s, the cartel was led by the Díaz-Parada brothers. It was active from 1980 to 2011.

descriptions: Juárez Cartel lists Oaxaca Cartel as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Línea (lead faction), Beltrán-Leyva Cartel (defunct), Barrio Azteca, Los Zetas, Oaxaca Cartel (defunct), Cali Cartel (defunct)

descriptions: The infobox lists the Juárez Cartel as an ally of the Oaxaca Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel , Juárez Cartel

descriptions: The Oaxaca Cartel operated at the service of the Tijuana Cartel, indicating a subordinate cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca cartel ... was one of the smaller drug cartels operating in Mexico and at the service of the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: The Oaxaca Cartel joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003, a cooperative alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca cartel reportedly joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003

descriptions: Oaxaca Cartel joined forces with Tijuana Cartel in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca Cartel reportedly joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003.

descriptions: Oaxaca Cartel is an ally of Tijuana Cartel per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Oaxaca Cartel (defunct)

descriptions: Oaxaca Cartel is listed as an ally of Tijuana Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Oaxaca Cartel (defunct)

descriptions: Young Savages was one of the constituent gangs that formed the South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: Casalesi were allied with Ferlito-Cappello clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carmine Alfieri e i Casalesi erano alleati dei boss perdenti come Gaetano Badalamenti , Tommaso Buscetta e i clan catanesi Ferlito - Cappello

descriptions: Alfieri clan was allied with Ferlito-Cappello clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Carmine Alfieri e i Casalesi erano alleati dei boss perdenti come Gaetano Badalamenti , Tommaso Buscetta e i clan catanesi Ferlito - Cappello

descriptions: Naha Clan and Koza Clan were originally opposed to each other before merging to form Kyokuryu-kai in 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: the Kyokuryu-kai was formed in 1970 as the Okinawa-rengo Kyokuryu-kai by two gangs, the Naha Clan and the Koza Clan. These two gangs ... had originally opposed each other until that merger.

descriptions: Naha Clan merged with Koza Clan to form Kyokuryu-kai in 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: the Kyokuryu-kai was formed in 1970 as the Okinawa-rengo Kyokuryu-kai by two gangs, the Naha Clan and the Koza Clan.

descriptions: Hezbollah is a member of the March 8 Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: National affiliation: March 8 Alliance

descriptions: Hezbollah is affiliated with the March 8 Alliance in Lebanon.
edges.evidence_quote: National affiliation: March 8 Alliance

descriptions: Hezbollah is a main party of the March 8 Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Hezbollah has been one of the main parties of the March 8 Alliance since March 2005.

descriptions: Hezbollah is part of the March 8 Alliance political coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: National affiliation: March 8 Alliance

descriptions: Hezbollah is part of the March 8 Alliance.
